intro: Gynandriris elata, also known as the blue-eyed grass, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Iridaceae. Traditionally, Gynandriris elata has been used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its purported anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
